tc_001: I understand how frustrating it must be to wait two weeks for your order. Please check your shipping confirmation email for a tracking number and look up the status on the carrier's website. If the tracking shows no movement, contact us with your order number and we'll investigate right away.
tc_002: I'm sorry your item arrived damaged. You can start a return by going to your order history and selecting 'Request Return.' Upload a photo of the damage and we'll process your refund within 5-7 business days.
tc_003: I'm sorry the app keeps crashing — that's really frustrating. Please try these steps: update to the latest version, clear the app cache, and restart your device. If it still crashes, try reinstalling. If the problem persists, please email our support team with your device model and OS version so we can investigate.
tc_004: I appreciate your kind words! To upgrade to premium, go to Settings > Subscription > Upgrade. You'll see the available plans and pricing on that page. Premium includes advanced features, priority support, and more storage. Let me know if you have questions about what's included!
tc_005: I'm sorry you've had such a difficult experience. I want to help make this right. I can arrange for a manager to contact you — please share your account email or order number and your preferred contact method. A supervisor will reach out to you within 24 hours.
tc_006: Thank you for reaching out! I'd be happy to help with billing. Please share the details of your question, or you can also check your billing history under Settings > Billing.
tc_007: I'm sorry about the double charge. Please first check if one is a pending authorization that may resolve on its own. If both are fully posted, contact us with your order number and we'll issue a refund for the duplicate charge. You can also try our live chat for faster help.
tc_008: I understand you'd like to cancel your subscription. You can do this in Settings > Account > Subscription by clicking 'Cancel.' Your access will continue until the end of your billing period. If there's anything we could improve, we'd love to hear your feedback.
tc_009: I'm sorry the color doesn't match what you saw online — that must be disappointing. You can start a return from your order history, or if you'd prefer a different color, please contact us with your order number and we'll arrange an exchange.
tc_010: Thank you for your interest! Yes, we ship to Sweden. You can see shipping costs and delivery estimates at checkout by entering your Swedish address. Import duties may apply depending on order value. Feel free to ask if you have other questions!
